section.name: Alpha Notice
section.p: ⚠ This plugin is in early-phase development (alpha). APIs, configuration schemas, HST component interfaces, and JCR node types are subject to change without notice between releases. Do not treat any aspect of this plugin as stable until a non-SNAPSHOT version is published to Bloomreach Forge.

section.name: Location
section.p: The demo project lives in the repository at demo/ as a standalone Maven build.

div.source: cd demo mvn clean install mvn -P cargo.run cargo:run

ul.li: Separate CMS and site runtimes with the plugin wired into both.
Search pages, category browse, recommendations, and autosuggest.
Bundled templates, picker integrations, and local Cargo-based startup.
